title: message_set update: message re-fetched for ownership then again inside edit_message_body — double read per edit
description: jmap.rs message_set update: ownership is validated by calling store.get_messages (1 SELECT per message). Then for the 'body' patch path, edit_message_body does another SELECT inside its own transaction (to get old_body and edit_history for the history append). This is two reads of the same row for a single body edit. The outer ownership check is redundant since edit_message_body already returns EditBodyResult::Forbidden if sender_id doesn't match. Suggested fix: remove the outer get_messages ownership check for the body path and rely solely on edit_message_body's Forbidden result; generalize the same pattern for other patch paths.
